summary: Estonia's Population Register (Rahvastikuregister) is a fully digital, centralized database maintained by the Ministry of the Interior. It contains records of all Estonian citizens, residents, and e-residents, including personal data, addresses, family relations, citizenship, and vital events. The register is the authoritative source for personal data across all government systems, accessible in real-time via X-Road data exchange infrastructure. Citizens can view and update their data through the eesti.ee portal.
notes: The Population Register operates on a once-only principle: citizens provide data once and it is reused across all government services via X-Road. The register is linked to the e-Identity system for authentication. Real-time updates ensure that address changes, births, deaths, and marriages are reflected immediately across all connected systems.
